title: cyclosorus hirtisorus
intro: Cyclosorus hirtisorus, also known as the hairy-leaved cyclosorus, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Cyclosorus hirtisorus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often combined with other medicinal plants to enhance its therapeutic effects.
